actionCalls.name: Create_Opportunity_Product_Record_Error_Log
actionCalls.label: Create Opportunity Product Record Error Log

value.stringValue: While attempting 'Send to ASPN' from Patient Record
While attempting 'Send to ASPN' from Patient Record
While attempting 'Send to ASPN' from Patient Record

decisions.description: Decision to check if the patient has related open opportunities.
decisions.name: Is_Open_Opportunity_Present
decisions.label: Is Open Opportunity Present?

Flow.description: Screen Flow that launches when 'Send to ASPN' quick action button is clicked from Patient Record Page.

formulas.name: DateOfBirthErrorMessageFormula
formulas.expression: IF({!DateOfBirthErrorIndicator} = "DOBInFuture", "Date of Birth cannot be in Future.",IF({!DateOfBirthErrorIndicator} = "Type2", "Age of Patient cannot be under 18 years for Diabetes Types: 'Type 2: Using Insulin' when Product is not 'DASH'", "Age of Patient cannot be under 2 years for Diabetes Types: 'Type 1' or 'Other/Unsure' when Product is not 'DASH'"))

formulas.name: DateOfBirthValidationFormula
formulas.expression: NOT ( ({!Related_Product} <> "DASH" && (( {!Type_of_Diabetes} <> "Type 2: Using Insulin" && {!Date_of_Birth} > ADDMONTHS(TODAY(), -24) ) || ( {!Type_of_Diabetes} = "Type 2: Using Insulin" && {!Date_of_Birth} > ADDMONTHS(TODAY(), -216) )))|| {!Date_of_Birth} > TODAY() )

formulas.name: IsErrorOccuredPublishPE
formulas.expression: IF(CONTAINS({!$Flow.FaultMessage}, "Error publishing ASPN Platform Events"), TRUE, FALSE)

formulas.name: PreRequisiteDataCheckFailedErrorMessage
formulas.expression: {!$Label.ASPN_DataCheckFailedErrorMessage} & BR() & IF({!PatientHasSourceID}, "", {!$Label.ASPN_PatientCustomUniqueId} & BR()) & IF({!PatientHasFirstName}, "", {!$Label.ASPN_PatientFirstName} & BR()) & IF({!PatientHasLastName}, "", {!$Label.ASPN_PatientLastName} & BR()) & IF({!PatientHasGenderIdentity}, "", {!$Label.ASPN_PatientGenderIdentity} & BR()) & IF({!PatientHasTelephoneNumber}, "",{!$Label.ASPN_PatientTelephoneNumber} & BR()) & IF({!PatientHasStreetName}, "",{!$Label.ASPN_PatientAddress} & BR()) & IF({!PatientHasCityName}, "", {!$Label.ASPN_PatientCity} & BR()) & IF({!PatientHasStateName}, "", {!$Label.ASPN_PatientState} & BR()) & IF({!PatientHasPostalCode}, "", {!$Label.ASPN_PatientZipCode} & BR()) & IF({!PatientHasDOB}, "", {!$Label.ASPN_PatientDOB} & BR()) & IF({!PatientHasDiabetesType}, "", {!$Label.ASPN_PatientTypeofDiabetes} & BR()) & IF({!DoctorHasFirstName}, "",{!$Label.ASPN_DoctorFirstName} & BR()) & IF({!DoctorHasLastName}, "",{!$Label.ASPN_DoctorLastName} & BR()) & IF({!DoctorHasStreetName}, "",{!$Label.ASPN_DoctorBillingStreet} & BR()) & IF({!DoctorHasCityName}, "",{!$Label.ASPN_DoctorBillingCity} & BR()) & IF({!DoctorHasStateName}, "",{!$Label.ASPN_DoctorBillingState} & BR()) & IF({!DoctorHasPostalCode}, "", {!$Label.ASPN_DoctorZipCode} & BR()) & IF({!DoctorHasPhone}, "",{!$Label.ASPN_DoctorPhone} & BR()) & IF({!DoctorHasNPI}, "",{!$Label.ASPN_DoctorNPI} & BR()) & IF({!PatientHasTransactionalEmailConsent}, "", {!$Label.ASPN_PatientTransactionalEmailConsent} & BR())

Flow.label: Send to ASPN

recordLookups.description: Checking if the Account Record has Related Open Opportunities.
recordLookups.name: Checking_Open_Opportunities
recordLookups.label: Checking Open Opportunities

recordLookups.name: Get_Related_Contact_Point_Type_Consent
recordLookups.label: Get Related Contact Point Type Consent

recordLookups.name: Get_the_Patient_Provider_Party_Role_Relation_Id
recordLookups.label: Get the Patient Provider Party Role Relation Id

screens.description: Screen to display message that the patient has related open opportunities.
screens.name: Has_Open_Opportunities_Screen
screens.label: Has Open Opportunities Screen

fields.name: Proceed_Sending_to_ASPN
fields.fieldText: Do you want to proceed sending to ASPN?

screens.description: This screen displays the form that creates the Opportunity related to the Patient.
screens.name: Opportunity_Creation
screens.label: Opportunity Creation
